hero.headline: Enable self management of long term conditions, at scale
hero.subheadline: The HealthStore is a commissioner decision-support tool for NHS digital health technology procurement. Find therapeutics by condition and assess evidence, assurance and deployment strategy all in one place.

value_props.title: Faster down-selection
value_props.description: Filter by condition, NICE status, DTAC, supervision model and local effort — without trawling supplier websites.

value_props.title: Clearer assurance view
value_props.description: See supplier assurance and commissioner deployment responsibilities side by side — not conflated.

value_props.title: Business-case ready
value_props.description: Each app page includes evidence summary, deployment footprint, cost model, financial considerations and funding links.

examples.detail: enrolled in NWL ICS remote monitoring programme — 12 months ahead of target
using COPDhub — 20,303 tonnes CO₂ reduction from inhaler prescribing shift
in Leicester COPD programme with Clinitouch (observational, Spirit Health affiliation declared)
by NICE MTG68 EAG for myCOPD in AECOPD pathway (CCG-era model)

about_note: This prototype is a demonstration tool containing curated content based on publicly available information as of March 2026. All information is indicative.
